generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, I'm glad to see our leaders taking steps to strengthen domestic security powers. The recent incidents show we can't afford to be complacent. While some worry about civil liberties, we need to remember that effective deterrence requires proactive measures. Our allies are stepping up - it's time we do the same. #NationalSecurityFirst
